method: Shopify products.json, fetched live via Exa
note: Prices are AUD as published on ccwonline.com.au on the availability-check date and may include GST per the retailer; verify current price and a current SDS before use. Reference dataset only — not a CARSI price list.
sdsMethod: sdsUrls re-fetched from the live Shopify products.json body_html on the check date: PDF links classified as SDS when the anchor text or URL matches /\bsds\b|msds|safety[-_ ]?data/i; non-http(s) links (e.g. broken file:// paths in the retailer copy) are excluded. An empty sdsUrls means no SDS link is published in the product description — it does not mean no SDS exists; obtain the current SDS from the supplier.
